subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to follow up from the conference! I'd be glad to get something on the calendar — a 30-minute call next week sounds like a good starting point.

Please share a few time slots that work for you and I'll confirm one that fits our schedule.

On the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I'm not in a position to share personal contact information for specific individuals. If the discussion develops and a senior technical conversation makes sense, we can facilitate the right introductions through the appropriate channels at that stage.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Agent
company.internal
